requirement_topic.en: Market Access — SLSI conformity, TRCSL radio, SLSEA energy, in-country importer
requirement_topic.zh: 市场准入——SLSI合格评定、TRCSL无线电、SLSEA能效、当地进口商
requirement_topic.zht: 市場准入——SLSI合格評定、TRCSL無線電、SLSEA能效、當地進口商

summary.en: Selling lithium batteries and power banks in Sri Lanka involves several bodies. SLSI (Sri Lanka Standards Institution) operates mandatory product certification and import inspection for regulated products plus the SLS mark. TRCSL (Telecommunications Regulatory Commission of Sri Lanka) approves and type-registers radio/telecom equipment, so a power bank with wireless charging or any RF feature needs TRCSL approval. SLSEA (Sri Lanka Sustainable Energy Authority) administers energy-efficiency labelling for certain appliances. A locally registered importer of record is required to clear goods through Sri Lanka Customs at the Port of Colombo and is the responsible party for conformity documentation. There is no foreign self-certification route equivalent to an EU Declaration of Conformity.
summary.zh: 在斯里兰卡销售锂电池及移动电源涉及多个机构。SLSI（斯里兰卡标准协会）对受监管产品实施强制产品认证及进口检验，并管理SLS标志。TRCSL（斯里兰卡电信监管委员会）对无线电/电信设备进行核准与型号登记，因此具备无线充电或任何射频功能的移动电源需TRCSL核准。SLSEA（斯里兰卡可持续能源管理局）对某些电器管理能效标识。须有当地注册的进口商（记录进口人）通过斯里兰卡海关在科伦坡港清关，并作为合格文件的责任方。不存在等同于欧盟符合性声明的境外自我声明路径。
summary.zht: 在斯里蘭卡銷售鋰電池及行動電源涉及多個機構。SLSI（斯里蘭卡標準協會）對受監管產品實施強制產品認證及進口檢驗，並管理SLS標誌。TRCSL（斯里蘭卡電信監管委員會）對無線電/電信設備進行核准與型號登記，因此具備無線充電或任何射頻功能的行動電源需TRCSL核准。SLSEA（斯里蘭卡可持續能源管理局）對某些電器管理能效標識。須有當地註冊的進口商（記錄進口人）通過斯里蘭卡海關在科倫坡港清關，並作為合格文件的責任方。不存在等同於歐盟符合性聲明的境外自我聲明路徑。

standards_or_laws: Sri Lanka Standards Institution Act No. 6 of 1984 — SLSI product certification, import inspection, and SLS mark
Sri Lanka Telecommunications Act — TRCSL type approval/registration of radio and telecom equipment
Sri Lanka Sustainable Energy Authority Act — SLSEA energy-efficiency labelling for in-scope appliances
Imports and Exports (Control) Act and Sri Lanka Customs import procedures (Port of Colombo)

summary.en: China's domestic market access for these products runs through CCC certification (for catalogue products), SRRC type approval for radio modules, and energy-efficiency labelling under the China Energy Label scheme, with no single foreign importer-of-record concept because the manufacturer sells domestically. Chinese CCC, SRRC, and energy-label registrations are domestic and are not recognised by SLSI, TRCSL, or SLSEA.
summary.zh: 中国对这些产品的国内市场准入通过CCC认证（目录产品）、无线电模块的SRRC型号核准，以及中国能效标识制度下的能效标识进行，且因制造商在国内销售而无单一境外记录进口人概念。中国CCC、SRRC及能效标识登记均为国内制度，不被SLSI、TRCSL或SLSEA认可。
summary.zht: 中國對這些產品的國內市場准入通過CCC認證（目錄產品）、無線電模組的SRRC型號核准，以及中國能效標識制度下的能效標識進行，且因製造商在國內銷售而無單一境外記錄進口人概念。中國CCC、SRRC及能效標識登記均為國內制度，不被SLSI、TRCSL或SLSEA認可。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) for catalogue products
SRRC type approval for radio transmission equipment
China Energy Label (CEL) registration for in-scope appliances

gap.en: Key gaps: (1) Chinese CCC/SRRC/CEL registrations do not transfer — Sri Lanka requires SLSI conformity (where in scope), TRCSL approval for any RF feature, and SLSEA labelling for in-scope appliances; (2) a locally registered importer of record is mandatory and holds the conformity documentation, unlike the EU's appointed Authorised Representative model; (3) there is no self-certification/Declaration-of-Conformity shortcut. Exporters should appoint a Sri Lankan importer early, confirm SLSI regulated scope for the specific product, and obtain TRCSL approval before shipping any wireless-charging power bank.
gap.zh: 主要差距：（1）中国CCC/SRRC/CEL登记不可转用——斯里兰卡要求SLSI合格评定（属于范围时）、任何射频功能的TRCSL核准，以及受监管电器的SLSEA标识；（2）须有当地注册的记录进口人并持有合格文件，与欧盟指定授权代表模式不同；（3）无自我声明/符合性声明捷径。出口商应尽早委任斯里兰卡进口商，确认具体产品的SLSI受监管范围，并在发运任何无线充电移动电源前取得TRCSL核准。
gap.zht: 主要差距：（1）中國CCC/SRRC/CEL登記不可轉用——斯里蘭卡要求SLSI合格評定（屬於範圍時）、任何射頻功能的TRCSL核准，以及受監管電器的SLSEA標識；（2）須有當地註冊的記錄進口人並持有合格文件，與歐盟指定授權代表模式不同；（3）無自我聲明/符合性聲明捷徑。出口商應盡早委任斯里蘭卡進口商，確認具體產品的SLSI受監管範圍，並在發運任何無線充電行動電源前取得TRCSL核准。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — SLSI conformity/SLS mark where in scope, TRCSL approval for any RF feature, SLSEA labelling for in-scope appliances, and a registered local importer of record for customs clearance at the Port of Colombo
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — CCC, SRRC, and China Energy Label registrations apply to in-scope products sold in China

source.publisher: Telecommunications Regulatory Commission of Sri Lanka (TRCSL)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Market access for Sri Lanka requires SLSI conformity/SLS mark where the product is in a regulated scope, TRCSL approval for any wireless feature, SLSEA labelling for in-scope appliances, and a locally registered importer of record to clear customs at the Port of Colombo. Chinese CCC, SRRC, and energy-label registrations are domestic and are not recognised; appoint a Sri Lankan importer and confirm scope with each regulator early.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 斯里兰卡的市场准入要求：产品处于受监管范围时的SLSI合格评定/SLS标志、任何无线功能的TRCSL核准、受监管电器的SLSEA标识，以及当地注册记录进口人在科伦坡港清关。中国CCC、SRRC及能效标识登记为国内制度，不被认可；应尽早委任斯里兰卡进口商并向各监管机构确认范围。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 斯里蘭卡的市場准入要求：產品處於受監管範圍時的SLSI合格評定/SLS標誌、任何無線功能的TRCSL核准、受監管電器的SLSEA標識，以及當地註冊記錄進口人在科倫坡港清關。中國CCC、SRRC及能效標識登記為國內制度，不被認可；應盡早委任斯里蘭卡進口商並向各監管機構確認範圍。
